packs.title: Privacy Redlines
packs.description: Require safe handling notes when private or sensitive project data is in scope.

rules.message_template: Call out safe handling, minimization, and redaction expectations when sensitive data is involved.
rules.description: Sensitive-data work must describe safe handling expectations.

packs.title: Operator Redlines
packs.description: Require explicit review signals for high-blast-radius work.

rules.message_template: Call out approval and review checkpoints before high-blast-radius execution.
rules.description: High-blast-radius tasks should note required review checkpoints.
